en.question: A can do a piece of work in 12 days. B is 60% more efficient than A. In how many days can B alone do the same work?
en.explanation: A's 1 day work = 1/12. B's 1 day work = 1.6 x (1/12) = 2/15. Time for B = 15/2 = 7.5 days.

hi.question: A 12 दिन में काम करता है। B, A से 60% अधिक कुशल है। B अकेला कितने दिन में?

en.question: A, B, and C can complete a work in 10, 12, and 15 days respectively. All three started together but A left after 2 days and B left 3 days before completion. How many total days did the work take?

hi.question: A,B,C क्रमशः 10,12,15 दिन में। A 2 दिन बाद छोड़े, B पूरा होने से 3 दिन पहले। कुल दिन?

en.question: 10 men can complete a work in 12 days and 12 women can complete the same work in 10 days. In how many days will 10 men and 10 women together complete the work?
en.explanation: Total work = 120 man-days = 120 woman-days. 1 man = 1 woman. 10+10=20 workers. Days=120/20=6.

hi.question: 10 आदमी 12 दिन, 12 औरतें 10 दिन में। 10 आदमी+10 औरतें कितने दिन में?

en.question: A and B together can complete a work in 8 days. A alone can do it in 12 days. In how many days can B alone do the work?

hi.question: A+B मिलकर 8 दिन, A अकेला 12 दिन। B अकेला कितने दिन में?

en.question: A is twice as efficient as B. Together they complete a work in 12 days. How many days will A alone take?

hi.question: A, B से दोगुना कुशल, साथ में 12 दिन। A अकेला?

en.question: 6 men and 8 women can complete a work in 10 days. 26 men and 48 women can complete the same work in 2 days. Find the time taken by 15 men and 20 women.
A can do a work in 15 days. B is 50% more efficient than A. In how many days can B alone complete the work?

hi.question: A 15 दिन में, B 50% अधिक कुशल। B अकेला?

en.question: A, B, and C can do a piece of work in 20, 30, and 60 days respectively. They work on alternate days starting with A. How many days will the work take?

hi.question: A,B,C क्रमशः 20,30,60 दिन में। A से बारी-बारी। कुल दिन?
